nasb.text: At that time the disciples came to Jesus and said, “Who then is greatest in the kingdom of heaven?”

esv.text: At that time the disciples came to Jesus, saying, “Who is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven?”

cnv.text: 那時，門徒前來問耶穌：“天國裡誰是最大的呢？”

ccb.text: 这时，门徒上前来，问耶稣：“在天国谁最伟大？”

csbs.text: 那时，门徒们前来问耶稣：“在天国里究竟谁更大？”
